title: wurmbea novae-zelandiae
intro: Wurmbea novae-zelandiae, also known as New Zealand helmet orchid or snake orchid, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Wurmbea novae-zelandiae include its ability to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and fungal infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Wurmbea novae-zelandiae is commonly prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies and skincare products.
